subject: Bump version of Mongo and Mariadb for NBI
commit_message:
Bump version of Mongo and Mariadb for NBI

Change-Id: Ib6042ee657415ec94d5c8acdd23a2ef1b5438a93
Issue-ID: EXTAPI-213
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> (1 comment)

Hi James, I actually did take a look on what images are used today and because VID is using mariadb:10, I thought it would be for the best.
I can use 10.3.14 if you want
